Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

I hate to give a -1 on this patch, but the indentation needs to be one more full tab stop inside the "for" loop as I previously mentioned.  If you refresh quickly then it can avoid the time taken to test this version of the patch, since the new build will take precedence over the old one.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review+1

(3 comments)

As I mentioned in my previous review, there wasn't any need to refresh the patch due to very trivial style issues, unless there is some better reason to refresh the patch.

I'm not entirely against getting every tiny detail correct in the patch, but I also do not want to needlessly block patches from landing when they are fixing much larger problems in the code than they are introducing.

Patch Set 7:

Isn't this patch good to go as this is reviewed by Andreas ?

Patch Set 7:

(1 comment)

Kirtan, our normal policy is that patches need to pass all tests before they can land, to avoid landing patches that introduce intermittent failures just because we don't think those failures are related.

In this case, it is highly unlikely that a script change in ost-pools.sh is causing a failure in replay-single.sh, but that is our policy for all patches.

In any case, there are also minor issues with this patch that could be fixed, so it makes sense to fix those and resubmit it rather than just rebasing the existing patch and testing it again.

parents.subject: LU-4640 mdt: implement Remove Archive on Last Unlink policy

commit.subject: LU-3782 test: Fix for faliure when no file are created.
commit.message:
LU-3782 test: Fix for faliure when no file are created.

The test_18 of ost-pools.sh failed when the createmany
function returns zero and test showed a divide by zero
error. Fixed the issue by adding a check for the return
value and also fixed incorrect average calculation.

Seagate-bug-id: MRP-1117
Signed-off-by: Kirtankumar Krishna Shetty <kirtan.shetty@seagate.com>
Change-Id: I13ea0c1aeb974b5e74dfc7d92fe4e3b744a1fba6
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16939
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly.liu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
